title: Cobblemon - Neco-Arc
description: An addon for Cobblemon that adds THE creature
body:
Here comes the creature from Melty Blood, Neco-Arc the Fighting/Fairy type!, Neco-Arc spawns in Dark Oak Biomes inside of woodland mansions but be careful she will not be easy to catch.

Neco-Arc stats are as follows:

hp: 80,
attack: 105,
defence: 60,
special_attack: 70,
special_defence: 70,
speed: 95


Warning, Neco-Arc might not be the most balanced of mons, her stats are quite average but the move pool boasts some heavy hitters.
